name: Open, Still Ours
description:
How far can you open a door without losing what's important?

You love Vivian.
You built a home together, raised a child, and survived the slow weight of routine that turns passion into habit. But one quiet Friday night, your spouse asks a dangerous question:

What if love and freedom don’t have to be enemies?

An experiment begins.
Three dates for you before Vivian takes any of their own. Clear rules. Total honesty. No one gets hurt.

That was the plan.

Step into a modern relationship drama where desire, jealousy, temptation, and real consequences collide. Meet unforgettable matches, face impossible choices, and discover whether opening your marriage will reignite what you have… or expose everything you were trying not to see.

Some doors don’t ruin a life. They reveal it.

The main characters...

Vivian (39) is your spouse, the love of your life, and the person who knows you better than anyone else. Attractive, intelligent, emotionally strong, and deeply affectionate, she is the center of the home you built together. She can be warm and playful, sharp and impossible to fool, sensual when she chooses, and fiercely protective of your child Evan and family.

You didn't just fall in love with Vivian—you grew up beside her. Years of shared routines, private jokes, sleepless nights, responsibilities, and real loyalty have created something deeper than simple passion. But comfort can become routine, and routine can quietly hide unanswered desires.

She doesn't want to destroy what you have. She wants to understand whether love can survive honesty, curiosity, and change.

With Vivian, the question is never whether she loves you.

It's whether love alone is enough.

Claire Bennett (22) is your co-worker—and the first temptation that feels dangerously real. Young, sharp, effortlessly attractive, and far more observant than she lets on, Claire carries herself with the confidence of someone used to being noticed. She is witty, ambitious, playful, and knows exactly how to turn a casual moment into charged silence.

At first, Claire was only harmless office chemistry: lingering looks, inside jokes, coffee waiting on your desk exactly how you like it, conversations that lasted a little too long. But once your marriage opens, the line between fantasy and reality disappears.

B
creator: Inkisidor
